# Fever / Infection Template
Copy and paste this template to quickly generate an infection/fever admission note.

```text
pt [] wt[]
alg nil
cc fever for [] days
hpi 
pmh nil
sx fever++ chills+ cough- dysuria- vomiting-
vitals bp[] hr[] spo2[] temp[] rr[]
pe general:well_hydrated rs:clear cvs:s1s2 abd:soft
ix hb[] wbc[] plt[] crp[]
ix cxr:wnl
ix dengue- malaria- widal-
dx Viral Fever 
rx paracetamol 1g tds po
```
